title: Clarify and fix admin panel login credentials

requirements.summary: Remove username field from admin login, display password-only hint, and ensure correct backend password verification
acceptanceCriteria: The admin login form has only a password field — no username field is present.
A visible hint or label on the login page informs the user that only a password is needed.
The backend verifyAdminPassword function is called with the correct hardcoded password and returns true, allowing access.
Entering the correct password grants access to the admin dashboard.
Entering an incorrect password displays a clear error message.
The known issue 'Admin panel login credentials unclear to user' is resolved.

file_operations.description: Remove the username field from the admin login form, keeping only the password input. Update the form label to clearly indicate 'Admin Password' and add a helper text or info message above or below the password field stating 'No username required — enter the admin password only.' Ensure the form calls verifyAdminPassword with only the password value. Update error messaging to clearly indicate 'Invalid password' instead of 'Invalid credentials'.
